Closes #

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] Relevant tests, or `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] Additional focused checks (describe below)

<!-- List commands run and their result. Explain any check that was not run. -->

## Content and data impact

- [ ] No curriculum, embedding, database, or RLS impact
- [ ] Curriculum changed; `pnpm activities:validate` was run as applicable
- [ ] Curriculum changed; `pnpm kb:embed` was run or its limitation is explained below
- [ ] Database migration included; `pnpm db:types` and local migration validation were completed

<!-- Describe applicable impact, migration/rollback considerations, and any limitations. -->

## Review notes

- [ ] User-facing copy is in English
- [ ] Tests were added or updated for regression-prone behavior, when applicable
- [ ] Screenshots or recordings are attached for visible UI changes
- [ ] No secrets or `.env.local` files are included
